exemplar.title: How does Aleksandar Hemon in his autobiographical compilation of essays, The Book of My Lives, used dramatic irony and parallelism to understand the protagonistâs survivorâs guilt as a Bosnia immigrant who witnessed the Bosnian War from afar?

detailedExemplarData.title: How does Aleksandar Hemon in his autobiographical compilation of essays, The Book of My Lives, used dramatic irony and parallelism to understand the protagonistâs survivorâs guilt as a Bosnia immigrant who witnessed the Bosnian War from afar?

subject.title: English Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Literature focuses exclusively on the study of literature, developing students' appreciation and critical analysis of literary works from various cultures, periods, and genres. Students examine poetry, prose, and drama through close reading, comparative analysis, and exploration of literary techniques and themes. The course cultivates sophisticated interpretive skills and deep understanding of how literature reflects and shapes human experience across different cultural contexts.

strengths: Accurate identification of core themes (survivorâs guilt, dark humour, parallelism, irony) in context
Consistent use of relevant quotations to support key points
Demonstrates satisfactory understanding beyond mere plot summary
weaknesses: Discussion centers on a single thematic strand rather than the full scope of the work
Interpretations are stated rather than developed persuasively or in depth
References lack precise page numbers and broader textual context
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The candidate shows a satisfactory grasp of the text, correctly outlining central themes and anchoring most ideas with textual support. However, the treatment remains at a mid-range level: interpretation is present but not sustained or persuasive, and referencing, while generally relevant, lacks precision and breadth. These factors align with a band-3 performance (satisfactory knowledge with interpretation; generally relevant references).

strengths: Identifies specific authorial choices (dramatic irony, parallelism, dark humour, narrative voice)
Moves beyond pure description by linking devices to the theme of survivorâs guilt
weaknesses: Analysis often reverts to paraphrase or broad assertions instead of unpacking implications
Evaluative insights are asserted rather than convincingly developed
Comparisons (e.g., to the Ukraine invasion) are noted but not systematically analyzed
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the essay demonstrates awareness of textual features and their thematic relevance, its analysis is uneven and frequently descriptive. Evaluative points lack depth and sustained unpacking, placing it at a lower band than satisfactory evaluative writing. The uneven depth and reliance on broad commentary justify a band-2 allocation.

strengths: Clear line of inquiry maintained from introduction through conclusion
Logical progression with effective topic sentences and transitions
Overall structure is cohesive and supports the central thesis
weaknesses: Integration of supporting examples is inconsistent; quotations sometimes dropped into text
Occasional rambling sentences and overly detailed background compromise focus
Some paragraphs lack precise topic sentences linking back to the central argument
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay is well organized and presents a coherent progression of ideas, meeting expectations for adequate to good organization. However, integration of evidence is uneven and occasional lapses in focus prevent elevation to the highest band. These mixed elements correspond to a band-3 performance (adequately organized with some development; supporting examples sometimes integrated).

strengths: Language is generally clear and meaning remains accessible throughout
Adopts an academic register with thesis statements, topic sentences, and analytical vocabulary
weaknesses: Frequent grammatical and agreement errors distract the reader
Awkward phrasing and informal transitions (âIn a nutshell,â sentence fragments) undermine precision
Inconsistent citation formatting and incomplete bibliographic entries
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the candidate maintains clarity overall and uses a mostly appropriate academic style, recurrent lapses in grammar, register and formal conventions limit the workâs linguistic accuracy and formality. The persistent errors and informal elements align with a band-2 profile (language sometimes clear with frequent errors; register to some extent appropriate).

strandSelections.reasoning: Supporting examples are **sometimes integrated smoothly** within analytical sentences, but integration is inconsistent; several quotations are dropped in with minimal syntactic blending or commentary. The pattern matches the descriptor for band 3: evidence is present and occasionally embedded, yet lacks the sustained, polished incorporation expected at band 4.

The student demonstrates a **satisfactory but not sustained grasp of the work**. Core conceptsâsurvivorâs guilt, dark humour, parallelism and ironyâare accurately outlined and connected to the Bosnian-War context, indicating an understanding that goes beyond plot summary. However, the discussion often reiterates general ideas (âguilt becomes a lifestyleâ) without probing the wider implications for form or genre, and it largely centres on one thematic strand rather than exploring the breadth of the collection. Interpretation is present but not developed persuasively or in depth, hence a mid-range band is most fitting.

The line of inquiryâhow irony and parallelism convey survivorâs guiltâis introduced clearly, revisited in each paragraph, and returned to in the conclusion, giving the essay **coherence and a mostly logical progression**. Topic sentences signpost argument, and transitions (e.g. âFurthermore,â âNext,â âTo continueâ) maintain flow. Although some sentences ramble, the overall structure is purposeful and largely cohesive, meriting placement in the âwell organisedâ band rather than the merely âadequateâ one.

Quotations are supplied in every body paragraph and are generally relevant to the points being made. **Most ideas are anchored by a textual reference**, showing an ability to select supporting material. Yet referencing is limited to brief snippetsâwith no page numbers or broader textual contextâand some claims (e.g. about narrative voice) lack direct evidence. Because the citations do support, but not consistently or with precision, the work aligns with a solid yet unspectacular âgenerally relevantâ level.

The student adopts an academic register with thesis statements, topic sentences and analytical vocabulary, demonstrating **mostly appropriate style for an HL literary essay**. Nonetheless, informal phrasing (âIn a nutshell,â âbrieflyâ) and occasional conversational constructions prevent full consistency, keeping the work in the mid-range rather than lifting it to the âconsistently appropriateâ band.

Overall language is **clear and meaning is accessible**, but there are repeated issues with tense, agreement and awkward phrasing (âused dramatic irony,â âboth the use ofâ¦ stand out due to their extensive useâ). These lapses distract but rarely obscure understanding, aligning with the âadequate accuracy despite some lapsesâ descriptor.

The essay moves **beyond description by identifying specific authorial choices** (dramatic irony, parallelism, dark humour, narrative voice) and attempting to relate them to survivorâs guilt. Nonetheless, analysis is uneven: explanations frequently slide into paraphrase or thematic commentary, and evaluative insights (e.g. how irony positions the reader) are asserted rather than unpacked. Occasional flashes of insight are offset by reliance on broad statements, situating the work comfortably in the âgenerally appropriateâ band.

annotations.comment: This narrative voice paragraph is overly long and unfocused; split it into smaller units to enhance clarity and coherence.
Assertions about a âforeigner narrative toneâ need targeted textual evidence; unpack how specific language choices create this effect.
The fragment ending âAâ indicates an incomplete example; finish quotes fully and ensure complete sentence structure.
The passive phrasing âparallelism is made betweenâ weakens the analysis; recast actively to highlight Hemonâs deliberate choice.
The transition âIn a nutshellâ is informal; replace with a formal phrase (e.g., âOverallâ or âIn summaryâ).
The phrasing âused dramatic irony and parallelismâ misuses past tense; revise to âusesâ for grammatical accuracy.
The research question is broad and repeats in the introduction; refine to clearly state the essayâs specific line of inquiry and scope.
Introduction outlines devices and context but lacks deeper interpretation of ironyâs implications on narrative form; develop this analysis.
Consider adding brief commentary on Hemonâs postmodern essayistic style to broaden contextual understanding.
The phrase âwas a conflict caused due toâ is redundant and awkward; rewrite for precision (e.g., âemerged fromâ).
The historical background is overly detailed; integrate these facts into your analysis more succinctly to maintain analytical focus.
Topic sentence âFirstly, the use of dark humorâ¦â is vague; specify how dark humor illuminates survivorâs guilt to sharpen focus.
Quotations appear abruptly and lack page references; embed them syntactically and include precise citations.
The conclusion of the dark humor section restates earlier points; instead, develop fresh insight or link back to your central argument.
Deepen your discussion of dramatic irony by explaining how it shapes the readerâs emotional stance toward survivorâs guilt.
This paragraph lacks a clear topic sentence linking dramatic irony back to survivorâs guilt; add one for cohesion.
The standalone fragment âTheir sense of self.â is unclear; revise into a complete sentence or integrate it with surrounding text.
Bibliographic entry lacks uniform formatting; include place of publication and follow a consistent style guide.
Ensure that every in-text citation corresponds precisely to your bibliography entry to maintain academic rigor.
The âBibliography:â header is correct but verify alignment and formatting according to your chosen citation style.
The conclusion fragment (âwhileâ) is incomplete; ensure a full synthesis that revisits your main argument.
The parallel to the Ukraine invasion is interesting but asserted rather than analyzed; draw explicit parallels to reinforce insight.
The adverb âBrieflyâ at the start is informal; opt for a more scholarly transition (e.g., âIn conclusionâ).
Revise the conclusion to explicitly revisit âdramatic ironyâ and âparallelism,â reinforcing coherence with your thesis.
Consider incorporating a secondary critical source to strengthen your contextual framing and scholarly dialogue.
